name: bluealpha-marketing-plugin
description: Paid media strategy, analysis, and measurement via BlueAlpha's unified MCP (Google Ads + Meta Ads + TikTok Ads + LinkedIn Ads + Meridian MMM). 51 skills for competitive strategy, creative refresh, audience intelligence, incrementality testing, geo expansion, budget reallocation, saturation analysis, attribution reconciliation, scenario planning, and full Meta + TikTok + LinkedIn audit suites — analysis-only, execution routed through the BlueAlpha pipeline. Requires the bluealpha-mcp connector.
